data.title: 99.2% of new shares of Trump's crypto project WLFI have been sold
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official website, 99.2% of the additional 5% shares (5 billion tokens) of Trump's crypto project WLFI have been sold.
Previously, the price of the additional 5% supply of Trump's crypto project WLFI rose to $0.05, and the previous round of price was only $0.015.

data.title: South Korea plans to lift ban on institutional investors investing in crypto assets in Q3
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News South Korea's Financial Services Commission (FSC) said on the 12th that it plans to issue a comprehensive investment guide by the third quarter of 2025 to allow institutional investors to invest in crypto assets. The guide will regulate cryptocurrency investments by institutional investors, listed companies and non-profit organizations and promote market stability.
South Korea plans to lift the eight-year ban on corporate cryptocurrency transactions, with the background including the implementation of the Virtual Currency User Protection Act, which laid the foundation for user protection, and changes in the market environment such as the entry of major overseas companies into the market. (CoinPost)

data.title: USDT Wallet Transfers Reach Six-Month High
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from Santiment reveals that over 143,000 wallets conducted USDT-related transfers yesterday, marking the highest level in six months. This surge in activity during a period of price decline suggests that traders are preparing to buy, which could contribute to a recovery in cryptocurrency prices.

data.title: Vitalik Highlights Ethereum's Clear Goals At Based Rollup Summit
data.description: According to Odaily, Vitalik Buterin spoke at the Based Rollup Summit hosted by Taiko, emphasizing that Ethereum's objectives have always been clear. He stated that Ethereum aims to attract a large number of users, enabling them to benefit from its openness, censorship resistance, and security features. Buterin also shared an optimistic outlook for Ethereum's development, suggesting improvements to past initiatives such as ICOs, DAOs, RAWs, and the social layer to minimize their shortcomings. He encouraged advancing these innovations, allowing Ethereum to support them, and leveraging teams like Taiko to achieve a transaction capacity of 10,000 per second.

data.title: Binance Completes USDC Integration on Hedera Hashgraph Network, Opens Deposit and Withdrawal Services
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Binance announced that it has completed the integration of USDC on the Hedera Hashgraph network and officially opened deposit and withdrawal services. Users can obtain the assigned USDC deposit address through the platform and view the relevant smart contract address on the Hedera Hashgraph network. USDC is issued by Circle Internet Financial Europe SAS, and holders can apply for redemption from Circle SAS at face value at any time. This integration further expands Binance's support for multi-chain assets.

data.title: Euler Finance Suffers Major Loss in DeFi Lending Attack
data.description: According to Foresight News, on this day in 2023, the decentralized finance (DeFi) lending protocol Euler Finance experienced a significant security breach. The attack resulted in a loss of approximately $197 million. This incident highlights the ongoing vulnerabilities within the DeFi sector, emphasizing the need for enhanced security measures to protect digital assets.

data.title: Dutch Regulator Fines BUX €1.6 Million For Regulatory Breach
data.description: According to PANews, the Dutch Authority for the Financial Markets (AFM) has imposed a €1.6 million fine on the online cryptocurrency and stock trading platform BUX. The penalty was issued due to BUX's use of financial influencers and referral programs to attract new customers, which violated industry regulations.

data.title: Starknet Foundation Aims To Enhance Bitcoin Network Throughput
data.description: According to Odaily, the Starknet Foundation has announced on the X platform its commitment to remain active on Ethereum while also becoming the execution layer for Bitcoin. The foundation's goal is to increase the Bitcoin network's throughput from 7 transactions per second (TPS) to several thousand TPS.

data.title: S&P 500 ends market session with gains for the first time in 6 days
data.description:
The S&P 500 finally snapped its six-day losing streak on Wednesday, closing 0.5% higher as investors rushed into beaten-down tech stocks. The Nasdaq Composite jumped by 1.2%, while the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell by 0.2%, extending its own three-day slide, according to data from CNBC. Futures for major indexes ticked up after the closing […]
